title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Siemens India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Siemens India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Siemens India Global Group in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India Global Group:
Siemens India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Global Group!
